top_claims.claim: CHEUNG MARTINA reported an insider sale of 6,266 shares ($2,620,880).
Eager William W reported an insider purchase of 4,066 shares ($2,124,851).

S&P Global is index and ratings infrastructure: fees on debt issuance, benchmark tracking, and data subscriptions with extraordinary margins. FY2025 filings confirm $15,336M revenue, $6,478M operating income, $4,471M net income, and $31,127M stockholders' equity; Q1 2026 revenue $4,171M (+10% YoY) with operating income
We expect **11.24%** per year over 7 years at **~$410.843** on **$17.5/sh** starting owner cash.

risk_claims.claim: CHEUNG MARTINA reported an insider sale of 6,266 shares ($2,620,880).
*Primary risk: Multi-year issuance drought compressing Ratings transaction revenue and preventing multiple expansion.
Regulatory breakup or ratings oligopoly erosion.
